arts.ttl: Baroni Evaluating the Condition of Two Lazio Defenders Ahead of Nice Clash
arts.sum: Lazio are currently short at the back, but they’ll be hoping to receive a boost with Samuel Gigot and Patric returning to the fold. The Frenchman sealed a loan move from Olympique Marseille to the Biancocelesti on the summer transfer market’s deadline day. However, he has yet to make a single appearance for the club.
